name: Skinny Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Red bell pepper, stemmed and seeded
1/2 lb Yellow onions, peeled and cut into 2 inch chunks
2 cups Canned Italian tomatoes with liquid
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the bell pepper, onion, and garlic in a food processor. Scrape into a 13x10x2 inch oval dish and stir in tomatoes, breaking up any whole tomatoes. Cover tightly with microwave plastic wrap. Cook at 100% power for 9 minutes (in a 650-700 watt oven). Prick the plastic to release steam.
2. Remove from the microwave. Uncover carefully and stir in beef and remaining ingredients except vinegar and black pepper. Cover tightly with microwave plastic wrap. Cook at 100% power for 5 minutes. Prick the plastic.
3. Remove from the oven and uncover. Stir in vinegar and pepper to taste. Stir well, breaking up any large chunks of beef. Serve over baked potatoes or rice.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS (PER 1/2 CUP SERVING): calories 186, fat 12g, sodium 244, protein 11g, carbs 7g, cholesterol 43mg
